message:
Fix DataLoader batch counting, CTCLoss bounds validation, and unused import

ft-data: Use indices.len() instead of dataset.len() for num_batches()
and next_batch() bounds, fixing incorrect batch counts when a subset
sampler is active. Remove redundant numel cross-sample check in collate
(shape validation already catches mismatches). Clean up unused bindings.

ft-nn: Add bounds validation in CTCLoss forward pass -- reject
input_lengths exceeding T dimension and target_lengths exceeding S
dimension with descriptive errors. Validate target labels are within
num_classes range to prevent silent out-of-bounds indexing.

ft-serialize: Remove unused std::io::Read import.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
